docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF SEPTEMBER 16, 2025 DEFAULT AND JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 77158965) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHINATOWN COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT CENTER, INC.
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT WU, QING MEI

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHINATOWN COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT CENTER, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WU, QING MEI THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 795 PACIFIC AVENUE, #223 SAN FRANCISCO CA 94108 SAN FRANCISCO, LEASE FORFEITED, ***JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY, AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY*** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 77090395)
